rationale: Missing arginfo options parameter for PHP 8.0 compatibility; internal PHP API fix, no spec involved.
AIX compilation failure due to ss_family detection bug; build/platform issue, no spec involved.
PHP 8 zpp error proxying to InvalidArgumentException; internal PHP API ergonomics, no MongoDB spec.
Improve Windows build extension dependency checks; pure build infrastructure, no spec.
Fix stale links in driver documentation help pages; docs issue, no spec behavior.
AIX platforms should not link libresolv; build/platform fix, no spec.
Memory leak in prep_tagsets on exception path; internal resource management, no contradicted spec rule.
Release checklist update to add docs compatibility ticket step; process/admin, no spec.
Cursor::current returns null on invalid positions; PHP iterator interface behavior, not a MongoDB spec rule.
Persistent client HashTable destroyed in wrong lifecycle phase; internal PHP extension threading issue, no spec.
Declare libbson vtable in MINIT instead of GINIT; internal refactor, no user-visible behavior change.
Move libmongoc init/cleanup ordering within vtable scope; internal refactor, no spec.
Use zend_hash_graceful_reverse_destroy for persistent clients; internal refactor, no user-visible change.
Reset libmongocrypt key vault client after forking; implementation concern, no specific CSFLE spec rule violated.
Cursor::key returns non-null on invalid positions; PHP iterator interface semantics, not a MongoDB spec rule.
Move null check before mongoc_client_set_error_api to avoid potential segfault; defensive code, no spec.
Wrong strncpy size in DBPointer init; internal C implementation bug, not a MongoDB spec violation.
Platform field in connection metadata truncates PHP version string; handshake metadata format bug, no specific spec rule cited.

Remove xtrace from CI shell scripts; CI infrastructure cleanup, no spec behavior.
Fix arginfo reporting ReadPreference as nullable when it is not; PHP API metadata fix, not MongoDB spec.

toPHP() mutates the $typeMap argument array; PHP-specific argument mutation bug, not a MongoDB BSON spec rule.
Correct return type in __set_state comments only; no behavior change, not spec-related.
Swapped ecalloc parameters (size vs number); internal C code correctness, no user-visible change or spec.

Fix zSeries build failure due to WORDS_BIGENDIAN redefinition from include ordering; build issue.
